publishedAbstract: * Is it possible to configure mount options for volumes in OpenShift 4? * How to configure NFS mount options for pods backed by NFS PV? * When creating a pod backed by NFS Persistent Volume, default mount options are set. How to edit these NFS mount options?
publishedTitle: Configure mount options for pods that are backed by PersistentVolumes (NFS or other volume types) in OpenShift 4?
